column3: [p]“If there was ever one thing in my shop that I’d feel comfortable recommendating to a beginner like yerself, it would be this one right here. Those asteroids will be a lot less threatening when you can back away from em.” [/p][p]  [/p][p]Lets you move backwards using the S key and the DOWN arrow.[/p]
[p]“What can I say? Sometimes ye just need a bit of a break.”[/p] [p]  [/p][p]Lets you pause the game by pressing the ESC key.[/p]

[p]“Ah, this ones a classic. Listenered to it all the time back when I was yer age. Tell you what, I will sell it to ye on the cheap on account of me sentimental side” [/p][p]  [/p][p]Plays music during the game. You can turn it on and off if you have the pause button.[/p]

[p]“This ones me favorite. I used it all the time when I was first orientatering myself here at the company. Like sailing a ship in stormy waters. If the ship happened to be invincible.”[/p] [p]  [/p][p]Greatly multiplies your speed whenever you press the Q key. For a short time after the initial burst of speed you will be invincible and blast through every obstacle.

[p]“Yer lucky I’m a consummerate porfessional, because I would never sell a trinket like this un if my  pirate values got in the way.”[/p][p] [/p][p] [/p][p]Makes your ship invincible for a few seconds when you press the E key.[/p]
[p] “If I hafta explain this one to you, kiddo, I’m afraid we coud never truly be friends.”[/p][p][/p][p]Explodes every enemy on screen whenever you press the TAB key. You get 3 charges per game.[/p]

[p] “This ones something The Lifer dreamed up… Between you and me, it's not very useful. Makes it a little too hard to keep track of the game.” [/p][p]  [/p][p]Makes your bullets wrap around the screen three times before they disappear. Offers a mysterious score multiplier[/p]
